title: Upon Sappho.
content:
Look upon Sappho's lip, and you will swear
    There is a love-like leaven rising there.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Sappho.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
